hero.subtitle: No templates. No agency runaround. Just fast websites that work — and this page is the proof.

design.title: Design & branding
design.description: Custom design that fits your brand — no templates, no shortcuts.

development.title: Web development
development.description: Fast, modern sites built with Next.js and deployed globally.

care.title: Care & growth
care.description: Hosting, updates, SEO and analytics — we keep your site working.

process.title: How it works
process.subtitle: Four steps. You always know exactly where your project stands.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We talk about your business, your customers and what the website needs to achieve. You get a clear proposal with scope, timeline and price.

build.title: Build
build.description: We build fast, modern and mobile-first with Next.js. You can follow progress on a live preview link at any time.

seo.title: SEO & performance
seo.description: We research the keywords your customers actually search, optimize every page for Google, and keep Core Web Vitals in the green — a site built to be found.

launch.title: Launch & grow
launch.description: We launch on fast global hosting, connect your domain and analytics, and stay available for updates, SEO and improvements.

price.question: How much does a website cost?
price.answer: Most projects land between a simple landing page and a full custom site with CMS — the price depends on scope. After a short call you get a fixed quote, no surprises.

timeline.question: How long does it take?
timeline.answer: A landing page is typically live in 1–2 weeks. Larger sites with custom features usually take 3–6 weeks from kickoff to launch.

included.question: What's included in a project?
included.answer: Design, development, mobile optimization, basic SEO, analytics setup, launch on fast hosting, and a handover so you can edit your own content.

maintenance.question: Do you offer maintenance?
maintenance.answer: Yes — optional monthly care: updates, backups, small changes, performance and security monitoring. No lock-in, cancel anytime.

location.question: Do you only work with businesses in Bali?
location.answer: No. We're based in Bali and love working with local businesses, but we work remotely with clients anywhere — most communication happens online anyway.

portfolio.title: The proof
portfolio.subtitle: Real sites, real businesses, live right now.

contact.title: Let's build yours
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We reply within one business day.
